Controlling Firestore With Private Rules (Firebase Admin Setup)

Last post showed how to connect Koa.js to Firestore, but it had a serious security issue — the rules were public. This post shows how to lock the rules down and control Firestore via Firebase admin credentials.
Adding Data to Firestore With Koa.js
Had to set up Firestore for a work project. There's already some material out there but I'm writing my own notes anyway.
